text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: That was a good session. Um, thank you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're only scheduled to do half a day of training today. I think about
how I'm going to spend my afternoon when Nishino Flower speaks.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: It's already the afternoon...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um, I misunderstood what you said about my bentos. I'm really sorry!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'll be more careful from now on, so... Uh... I guess I'll see you
tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to give Nishino Flower money to pay for the lunch
ingredients, but she runs off before I can say a word.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What did she mean by misunderstanding? I wish I could ask her, but I
guess that won't be possible today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later that afternoon, I'm walking around the train station when I spot
Nishino Flower doing some shopping.
choice_data_list: I didn't think I'd run into you here.
I didn't think I'd run into you here.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes. I came here to get some new running shoes. Um... Are you out
shopping too?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
My parents told me it's about time I got some new ones and sent me
more money than usual...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
They've been like that even before I entered Tracen Academy. When
it comes to training, they always go above and beyond in supporting
me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Mom! Dad! I... I want to run more! I want to enter more races!

text_block_list.name: Flower's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Then you have our full support! You'll need a good pair of shoes first.
And you'll also need...

text_block_list.name: Flower's Father
text_block_list.text:
A place where you can train and run to your heart's content! We might
as well buy some land, big enough to build facilities on and—

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
They've given me everything I need to run. It's almost to the point
where I wonder if I'm not asking for too much...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yes! They're so kind. I couldn't be happier to be their daughter!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But... whenever I go shopping on my own, I don't know what to get. I
have to use my money wisely and make a good choice.
choice_data_list: Do you want me to tag along?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You're in the middle of your own shopping, right? I couldn't
impose... You're probably really busy...
choice_data_list: I just came out here for a walk.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Really? Well, then... Um. Okay! If you really don't mind. I'll try not to
take up too much of your time!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Should I get shoes with a bit more weight to them this time? I
don't know...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (I probably should, especially if I'm going to step up my training.)

text_block_list.name: Academy Nurse
text_block_list.text:
You'll probably need to focus on rehabilitation for a while. I'll have a
car brought around to take you to the hospital, just in case.

text_block_list.name: Academy Nurse
text_block_list.text:
I know you're starting to train in earnest, but you're still growing.
Pushing yourself too hard will have immediate repercussions on your
body. You know that, right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.

text_block_list.name: Academy Nurse
text_block_list.text:
Good. You'll be fine—with proper rehabilitation, you'll be training
again before you know it. But you have to take it easy for now, all
right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (What if I get into another accident?)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I need to avoid that at all costs. I don't want Mom and Dad to worry,
and I'm already putting a lot on Trainer's plate!)
choice_data_list: There are other ways to intensify your training.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to use resistance equipment for the entire training
period. There are other methods, like wearing weighted cleats, that
are just as effective.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I casually mention that gear can be changed based on Nishino
Flower's condition at any given time.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh... Y-you're right! Sorry for eating up your time...
choice_data_list: You have nothing to apologize for.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
No. You're using your valuable time to help me out while I'm standing
around overthinking.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer. I'll get the regular pair then!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I won't let your advice go to waste. I can't wait to try these new shoes
out tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Nishino Flower dashes off to make her purchase.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My advice, if you could call it that, was more of an offhand comment,
but it seems she's taken it to heart.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: It's already evening. I'm sorry for taking up so much of your time...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I want to wear these shoes tomorrow, so I'll need to break them in as
soon as I get home. I'll be using the standard cleats and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So it's not just my imagination. She is behaving differently than normal. She seems overly concerned about how I'll react.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower always makes an effort to read the room. She thinks
about what the people around her want, and goes out of her way not
to burden anyone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And she's probably doing the same thing with me. However, it's not
healthy to keep going like this.
choice_data_list: (I want her to know it's okay to open up to me!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She can share all her burdens with me if she wants. If something's
bothering her, I don't want her to keep it bottled up. That's part of
what being a trainer is about.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer? Is there something...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Y-you surprised me...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: It's no problem. But... Hehe. You're already doing so much for me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
So the least I can do is put in the same effort, so I don't end up just
taking from you without giving anything back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Nishino Flower's smile, I silently vow once more to protect that
sunny expression.
